summary:
The core effort centred on Summit, a SaaS crypto algorithmic trading platform with AI and neural network features. The engineer built out the entire system: execution engine integration with multiple exchanges, live stop-loss/take-profit, a layered guard system for risk management, follower and leaderboard features, and admin analytics. UX polish included mobile-responsive UI, Telegram user bot notifications, and onboarding flows. Security hardening and latent-risk fixes were a major theme alongside feature development.

Alongside Summit, the engineer developed a feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation firmware for ESP32-S3 (j-uni-hid), iterating from v10 through v13 with USB, BLE, and touch capabilities, and a Windows kernel input filter driver (input-driver) for capturing and injecting input events. A lightweight AutoHotKey alternative (jolt) with interception support was also built.

Secondary projects spanned crypto trading strategy research and backtesting, a deep learning price prediction model with Mixture of Experts architecture, computer vision for poker hand tracking, an on-device LLM for Android with tool use and delegation, a Windows Explorer file-tagging extension, and an Android TTS engine with Russian voice support.

items.title: Summit platform feature sprint
items.description: Shipped a massive set of features: live SL/TP execution, guard system, follow-trading, leaderboard, Telegram user bot, admin analytics, and mobile UI improvements.

items.title: Lightweight AutoHotKey alternative
items.description: Built a scenario engine with interception support, typed actions, stateless themes, and debug logging.

items.title: Firmware v13 and fire-and-forget emitting
items.description: Refined USB HID and BLE emulation, adding fire-and-forget event emitting, an 8x8 matrix variant, and platformio support.

items.title: Windows input filter driver finalization
items.description: Completed the KMDF driver with push-style event delivery, integration tests, and relaxed SDDL permissions.

items.title: Desktop.ini UTF-16 fix and CI restructuring
items.description: Fixed encoding in desktop.ini for Explorer compatibility and restructured the CI pipeline for manual releases.

items.title: TTS engine expansion and Russian voice pipeline
items.description: Integrated multiple TTS engines (TeraTTS, Sherpa, Piper) with Russian-specific normalisation, intonation control, and pitch adjustment.

items.title: Firmware v13 USB and BLE debugging
items.description: Diagnosed and fixed USB disconnection issues and refined BLE connectivity for the ESP32-S3 firmware.

items.title: Changelog and release workflow
items.description: Fixed changelog generation and automated release drafting in CI.

items.title: Firmware v12 dual-core and v13 USB foundation
items.description: Built v12 with dual-core architecture and laid groundwork for v13 USB HID support.

items.title: Crypto price prediction model research
items.description: Conducted 336+ experiments exploring Mixture of Experts, cross-pair features, and ensemble methods, achieving best combined F1 of 0.782.

items.title: On-device LLM with tool use and delegation
items.description: Refined the Android LLM app with sub-agent delegation, tool routing, model keep-alive, and debuggability.

items.title: CI/CD pipeline overhaul and store publishing
items.description: Rebuilt the CI pipeline with manual triggers, release tagging, and automated Microsoft Store submission logic.

items.title: Graph-based code intelligence engine
items.description: Expanded Jaxon with LSP integration, index freshness detection, and new language parsers.

items.title: Computer vision pipeline for poker hand tracking
items.description: Achieved 99% hand detection accuracy, integrated recovery module, and validated against PokerStars hand history protocol.

items.title: Firmware v11 fixes and Android reconnect
items.description: Addressed BLE reconnect issues, touch jitter, and refined performance profiles for v11.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy development and backtesting
items.description: Iterated on dozens of trading strategies with hyperopt optimization, added new signal combinations, and refined entry/exit logic.

items.title: Telegram multi-bot for Freqtrade monitoring
items.description: Built a web application and Telegram bot manager for tracking daily profit, trade performance, and bot status.

items.title: Firmware v10–v11 and HID experimentation
items.description: Developed multiple firmware versions adding USB/BLE touch, mouse, performance modes, and self-reporting.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding and automation
items.description: Extended the auto-claude multi-session AI coding tool with squash merging, Git rules, and task management.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Maintained the legacy intag utility with CLI, logging, and UI polish, working toward a Microsoft Store release.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy early work
items.description: Experimented with initial crypto trading strategies and hyperopt parameter tuning.
